title: HMW gDNA Extraction from Prokaryotic Cultures and Cryo Preservation Stocks
author: Richard Stöckl

steps.title: Transfer the bacteria-/archaea-suspension (~ 50 µL...
steps.instruction: Transfer the bacteria-/archaea-suspension (~ 50 µL ) from one cryo preservation capillary to a 1.5 mL reaction tube or pellet a well-grown culture by centrifugation 15000 rpm, °C, 15 minutes , discarding the supernatant, and resuspending the cell pellet in ~ 50 µL media

steps.title: Add 490 µL TE Buffer Contributed...
steps.instruction: Add 490 µL TE Buffer Contributed by users + 20 µL freshly prepared Lysozyme from chicken egg white Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #L6876 solution ( 10 mg/mL , in TE Buffer Contributed by users ) and vortex briefly

steps.title: add 5 µL Proteinase K, Molecular...
steps.instruction: add 5 µL Proteinase K, Molecular Biology Grade - 2 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #P8107S ( 20 mg/mL ) + 10 µL Monarch RNase A – 1 ml (2x0.5ml) New England Biolabs Catalog #T3018L ( 10 mg/mL ) and 15 µL of 20 Mass / % volume SDS Roth Catalog #CN30.3 , vortex briefly

steps.title: freeze at -80 °C for 00:30:00...
steps.instruction: freeze at -80 °C for 00:30:00 and thaw at 60 °C for 00:10:00

steps.title: repeat go to step #6 two...
steps.instruction: repeat go to step #6 two additional times (total of three cycles)

steps.title: add 100 µL of 5 Molarity...
steps.instruction: add 100 µL of 5 Molarity (M) Sodium chloride P212121 and mix well (this step is crucial as a CTAB–nucleic acid precipitate will form if salt concentration drops below about 0.5 M at room temperature)

steps.title: add 80 µL of 10 Mass...
steps.instruction: add 80 µL of 10 Mass / % volume CTAB (Cetyltrimethylammonium-bromide) Serva, Germany Catalog #16530 in 700 millimolar (mM) Sodium chloride P212121

steps.title: add one volume (should be roughly...
steps.instruction: add one volume (should be roughly 750 µL ) chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1; Roti-C/I Carl Roth Catalog #X984.2 ), shake vigorously, centrifuge full speed (> 12.000 rcf, Room temperature, 2 minutes ), transfer top (aqueous) phase to new tube

steps.title: mix aqueous phase with equal volume...
steps.instruction: mix aqueous phase with equal volume phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1; Roti-Aqua-P/C/I Carl Roth Catalog #X985.2 ), centrifuge full speed (> 12.000 rcf, Room temperature, 2 minutes ) as before, and transfer top (aqueous) phase to new tube

steps.title: mix aqueous phase with equal volume...
steps.instruction: mix aqueous phase with equal volume chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1; Roti-C/I Carl Roth Catalog #X984.2 ), centrifuge as before (> 12.000 rcf, Room temperature, 2 minutes ), and transfer top (aqueous) phase to new 1.5 mL LoBind tubes Eppendorf Catalog #022431021

steps.title: add 0
steps.instruction: add 0.6 volumes (roughly 360 µL ) of cold 100% 2-Propanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #190764 + 0.06 volumes (roughly 36 µL ) of 3 Molarity (M) Sodium acetate trihydrate Carl Roth Catalog #3856.1 pH 5.2

steps.title: centrifuge 16
steps.instruction: centrifuge 16.000 rcf, Room temperature, 20 minutes , discard supernatant, air dry briefly

steps.title: add 0
steps.instruction: add 0.6 volumes cold ( -20 °C ) 70 % (v/v) Ethanol P212121 Catalog #BE-BDH1156 , centrifuge at 16.000 rcf, Room temperature, 10 minutes , discard supernatant, air dry briefly

steps.title: resuspend in 50 µL Nuclease-free Water...
steps.instruction: resuspend in 50 µL Nuclease-free Water - 25 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B1500S or Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086 or similar (ideally let this rest at 4 °C for several hours)

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: repeat go to step #17 once
